However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately initiated a comprehensive demotion strike: this is a natural person sole proprietorship micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of only 66,000 RMB, and its 2023 insured headcount is shockingly an absolute '0 people'! Zhujiang Road is Nanjing's iconic computer and digital street, and 'Xiongshi International Building' is a famous electronics market building on the street; a door number with a letter like '1A11' usually means it is a tiny segmented stall or counter on the first floor of the market. In a bustling first-floor stall of a computer city, relying on 0 employees and using 66,000 RMB to establish an industrial assembly line manufacturing electronic devices? This is completely absurd. Reviewing its extremely grounded true business license: 'sales and maintenance of electronic products, computers; sales of office consumables; sales and repair of digital products.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; it is a pure 'One-Person Electronics Retail & Repair Kiosk hidden in the Zhujiang Road computer city.'
